name: Fitted Crib Sheet Rugby Stripe - Blue/White - Cloud Island™: Standard Size, 100% Cotton, 200 Thread Count Percale
description:
This Fitted Crib Sheet from cloud island™ is suitable for standard cribs and toddler beds. Made from 100% percale cotton, the standard crib sheet fits a six-inch mattress and is designed with all-around elastic for a secure fit over the crib mattress. It's adorned with rugby stripes in blue and white to add a timeless touch of cute style to your baby's nursery.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
